user_prompt: Guide me through melta bomb a purification
prayer:
Approach the melta bomb with solemn reverence and intone the Canticle of Purgation.
Anoint the melta bomb's volatile core with blessed ablative oils to enact purification.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the melta bomb to expel all profane residues from its sacred mechanisms.
Chant the expungement litanies whilst passing the incense brazier over the melta bomb thrice.
Verify the melta bomb's sanctity through auspex invocation of the Omnissiah's purity.

user_prompt: Ready the pteraxii sterylizor for cooling
prayer:
Kneel before the pteraxii sterylizor and invoke the Rite of Thermal Equilibrium for cooling.
Circulate sacred cryofluids through the pteraxii sterylizor's heat-sinks with murmured binaric hymns.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the pteraxii sterylizor to embrace the cooling embrace of the Void Father.
Monitor the pteraxii sterylizor's vents with diagnostic noosphere probes.
Seal the rite by anointing the pteraxii sterylizor's chassis in the name of the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for transit mag-rail a cooling
prayer:
Present thyself unto the transit mag-rail and commence the cooling invocation with sacred oils.
Infuse coolant sacraments into the transit mag-rail's induction coils, chanting litanies of chill.
Awaken the Machine Spirit within the transit mag-rail to accept this cooling restoration.
Cycle the transit mag-rail's servos through thermal penance rituals.
Conclude with auspex blessings upon the transit mag-rail, praising the Omnissiah's temperate grace.

Gather before the webber in ritual circle and beseech the spirits for cooling mercy.
Pour sanctified refrigerants upon the webber's spinnerets whilst intoning cryo-canticles.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the webber to quell its febrile ardor through this cooling rite.
Test the webber's equilibrium with noospheric thermic scans.
Anoint and seal the webber under the Omnissiah's unyielding gaze.

user_prompt: How do I bless the enginarium for recalibration?
prayer:
Approach the enginarium with mechadendrites extended in recalibration supplication.
Invoke the alignment noostras of the Omnissiah to guide the enginarium's recalibration.
Realign the enginarium's plasma conduits through sacred binary recalibration sequences.
Beseech the enginarium's Machine Spirits to harmonize in perfect computational unity.
Affirm the recalibration with logi-runic seals and incense oblation.

Circumambulate the thallax and intone the Diagnostic Doxology of the Omnissiah.
Interface noospheric probes with the thallax to commence diagnostics upon its cybernetic form.
Beseech the Machine Spirit enshrined in the thallax to reveal faults through auspex divination.
Purge anomalous data-slates from the thallax whilst chanting error-expungement litanies.
Seal diagnostics with a blessing upon the thallax's occulobe arrays.

user_prompt: Consecrate the assault cannon before blessing

Anoint the assault cannon's barrel with sacred lubricants in preparation for blessing.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the assault cannon to receive the Omnissiah's blessing.
Chant the full Benediction of Carnage over the assault cannon's feed mechanisms.
Verify the assault cannon's sanctified fury through test-fire invocation.

Initiate noospheric boot-cycles whilst murmuring ignition litanies.
Ascertain the Vendetta gunship's readiness under the Omnissiah's aegis.

Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the needle rifle to shed impurities in this rite.
Pass the needle rifle through cleansing plasma-flame thricefold.
